heading: Fishing vessel exemption
label: 8105 Fishing vessel exemption
text: Notwithstanding any other provision of law, neither the International Convention on Standards of Training, Certification and Watchkeeping for Seafarers, 1978, nor any amendment to such convention, shall apply to a fishing vessel, including a fishing vessel used as a fish tender vessel.
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 8105, , , , authorized Secretary to prescribe regulations to carry out this part prior to repeal by , , .Pub. L. 98–8997 Stat. 550Pub. L. 101–595, title VI, § 603(7)(A)104 Stat. 2993Aug. 26, 1983Nov. 16, 1990
